advert.description: The Save the Children ad ends with a donation screen displaying phone numbers and website links, which is visible until 01:10 before the Morrisons ad begins.
The Morrisons ad features women eating hot cross buns, transitioning to a green screen with the 'More reasons to shop at Morrisons' logo at 01:28.
The Gillette Labs ad showcases shaving routines and concludes with a product shot and a smiling child at 02:00 before the Toffifee ad starts.
The Toffifee ad shows family fun and product packaging, ending with a close-up of the Toffifee box at 02:19 before cutting to the airport scene.
The 'On the Beach' travel ad promotes free lounge access and booking geniuses, ending with the 'Free Lounge' text over a beach scene at 02:49 before the property ad animation begins.
The Fast Cash Property ad uses animations of houses and text overlays highlighting quick sales and no hidden costs, concluding with the contact details at 03:19 before the Boots ad starts.
The Boots 'Spring Mission' ad features a woman shopping and ends with a display of cosmetic products and the offer details at 03:40, just before the channel ident.
